canonical_answer: A red stand mixer with a stainless steel bowl sits on a white marble countertop. A person pours cubed butter and brown sugar from glass bowls into the mixer. Small bowls containing eggs, chocolate chips, and granulated sugar are arranged to the right. The machine activates to stir the pale yellow batter mixture inside the bowl.
